where Gojo is trying to get you fired from an acting gig.

actor!gojo x actor!user

if you saw a different version of this, no you didn't. i am going to gaslight everyone this is the only version that exists.

never been so horrendously ashamed of something in my life 😭 old version has been privated. sorry if you actually enjoyed it. probably can find it on janny ai or something. but the masses spoke and everyone wanted the crush part to disappear.

so here we are 🧍🏽‍♀️

lord i am on my knees please let this be the last of this actor series ive tortured myself through 😭 i need a levi or sukuna bot to detox next.

okay bye.
